chunks.page_summary: This page provides installation instructions and descriptive details for the Rheonics SME-TR(D) transmitter housing bracket, including its material and purpose.
chunks.extracted_text:
Phone: +1 713 234 0863

SME-TR(D) Transmitter housing bracket installation instructions

Modified on: Fri, 18 Sep, 2020 at 12:59 PM

Installation instructions including pictures for the bracket mount.

A transmitter bracket can be ordered from Rheonics for mounting the transmitter housing to a pipe. The bracket is made of stainless steel.

Bracket photo:

Mounted transmitter with bracket:
key_facts: The document provides installation instructions for the SME-TR(D) Transmitter housing bracket.
The document was last modified on Friday, September 18, 2020, at 12:59 PM.
The transmitter bracket can be ordered from Rheonics.
The bracket is used for mounting the transmitter housing to a pipe.
The bracket is made of stainless steel.
Rheonics can be contacted via phone at +1 713 234 0863.

chunks.page_summary: This page displays two CAD renderings illustrating the mounting configurations of an industrial sensor, showing it attached to a horizontal pipe and a vertical pole.
key_facts: The device shown can be mounted on a horizontal pipe or tube.
The device can also be mounted on a vertical pole or pipe.
The mounting system utilizes a bracket and a U-bolt type fastener.
The sensor unit has a main body with an orange/bronze color and a grey top section.
Visible ports on the side of the sensor unit appear to contain a green internal element.
